creator: valery@vslash.com
text:
Created attachment 235546
cura-4.8.0_8 output log

* cura-4.8.0_8 crash with Python-3.9
#1. exiting Cura lead to an exception + python3.9 crash and dump ; it seems that some git issue report using python-357 instead of other version ; eg: https://github.com/Ultimaker/Cura/issues/9271#issuecomment-779153891

See attachment for the full cura output log ( 2>1& )

#2. cura can only slice one time, then, trying to slice has no effect but leaving the cura-engine at 100% ; you must leave (+crash) and restart the app. perhaps same origin as for #1

Q1: python-3.5.x has no port currently ; I wonder if I could had this version to the port in order to provide the right devel env. to Cura ? any advises on this ?

Thanks for your help,

--
Valéry S.
